raw_consumer_statement:
I discovered XXXX charges by a company called XXXX on my account when I went to pay the account. I attempted to file the fraud forms online through my portal on multiple occasions but kept getting " come back later '' messages. Calls to Citi were unanswered and timed out as they exceeded XXXX minutes. When I finally got through to a human, I was left on hold and sent to multiple persons for over XXXX minutes attempting to file the fraud claims. Instead of reversing the charges, Citi is forcing me to pay the bill while they sort out the fraud claim. I did not, do not and will NEVER subscribe to any sort of AI service which apparently this Nebula company is. Why am I being forced to pay for fraud? If I don't pay the bill, they will charge me late fees and penalties for the fraud charges. 

At very least, I should be paid interest on the money I was forced to pay. I now have to keep the account open in order to get my money back. 

CITIBANK DOES NOT PROTECT OR RESPECT IT'S CLIENTS.
